extract: Thundurus (Japanese: ボルトロス Voltolos) is a dual-type Electric/Flying Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation V. While it is not known to evolve into or from any Pokémon, Thundurus has a second form activated by using the Reveal Glass. Its original form, Incarnate Forme, will then become Therian Forme. Its Therian Forme was officially revealed on May 12, 2012. Along with Tornadus, Landorus, and Enamorus, it is a part of the forces of nature. In Pokémon the Series: Black & White, it is associated with Meloetta.
